infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: NChat uses your contacts to help you connect with friends who are already on NChat.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NChat uses your camera for video calls and sending photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NChat uses your microphone for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NChat uses your photo library for sending images in chats.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NChat to access your camera for video calls and photo capture.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NChat to access your microphone for voice and video calls.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow NChat to access your contacts to find friends already on NChat.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NChat to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow NChat to save photos to your library.
plugins.videosPermission: Allow NChat to access your videos.
plugins.audioPermission: Allow NChat to access your audio files.
